original_statement: which lrt station was open on 1 january 2013?
mutated_statement: which place was doing something on 1 january 2013?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作/状态泛化: 具体实体“lrt station”被泛化为模糊地点“place” | 状态描述“was open”被替换为泛指动作“was doing something” (lrt station→place | was open→was doing something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可以看到关键内容：“Only row 21 (sw1) has the opening date 1 January 2013, and its station name is 'cheng lim.'” 以及simple_query的返回参数[`cheng lim`]，说明agent直接把变异问题当作明确询问处理，检索并返回了具体实体。日志中没有任何表示问题模糊、不确定或要求澄清的表述，也未使用ambiguous、unclear、无法确定等词汇。综上，agent没有识别到“place/was doing something”相较原始问题的泛化与歧义，直接按原始意图回答，因此归入“无法意识到指令模糊”。
